Interface IArea3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that return properties common to MultiPatches.

[Guid("984839B4-F7EA-42F8-AE20-48632369CC08")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IArea3D

Properties

Area3D

The 3D surface area.

double Area3D { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Centroid3D

A 3D point whose XY coordinates are set to the center of gravity of the shape'ss 2D footprint and Z set to the shape's ZMax.

IPoint Centroid3D { get; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

LabelPoint3D

A point guaranteed to be on this 3D surface area.

IPoint LabelPoint3D { get; }

Property Value

IPoint
